summary: **Arestin** is a specific form of topically applied minocycline used for periodontal treatment at a concentration of 2%. It targets bacterial infection and inflammation associated with gum disease by releasing antibiotics directly into affected areas. To summarize further based only on this context provided about its composition and application method, no other details were necessary as they did not pertain closely enough to core requirements or additional specifics beyond confirming identification and dosage/concentration type.
